examples: When he got back, he switched labs to study how cerebrospinal fluid nourishes the developing nervous system.
Two cerebrospinal fluid specimens have tested positive for Neisseria meningitidis serogroup by latex test.

Cerebrospinal fluid analysis revealed lymphocytic pleocytosis and high protein.
